chapter.title: Notes
chapter.simpara: This section provides a collection of miscellaneous notes on MySQL Native Driver usage.

listitem.simpara: Using mysqlnd means using PHP streams for underlying connectivity. For mysqlnd, the PHP streams documentation () should be consulted on such details as timeout settings, not the documentation for the MySQL Client Library.

As of PHP 8.4.0, when connecting to a MySQL server of version 8.0.24 or later, the error code reported for a server wait timeout is 4031 (ER_CLIENT_INTERACTION_TIMEOUT) instead of 2006 (CR_SERVER_GONE_ERROR).
